summary: Graphical application for personal financial accounting with multicurrency support, import/export, tags, budgets, debts, assets, and goals.
description: Ledgera personal finance desktop app with multicurrency support, import and export flows, budgets, debts, assets, and reports.

This Linux packaging wave adds native deb/rpm system packages alongside AppImage while keeping mutable user data outside the install tree and preserving the existing Windows installer and updater contract.
release_notes: Added first-class Linux system-package packaging on top of the existing PyInstaller onedir bundle, with deb and rpm artifacts.

Linux package and software-center identity now uses Ledgera for package names, desktop and AppStream IDs, launcher path, and artifact names while keeping internal FinAccountingApp runtime paths for compatibility.
The Linux release workflow now builds and publishes Ledgera AppImage, deb, and rpm artifacts.
Packaged Linux manual-update messaging now points users to downloading a newer Linux package or AppImage from GitHub Releases.
GNOME Software may still omit license details or release notes for locally installed third-party packages even when AppStream metadata is bundled.
